column8: Rounded to subrounded COBBLES and fine to coarse GRAVEL and CONCRETE. No recovery reported, finer material washed out. (FILL)

Moderately strong brown/ash grey, spotted black and white, moderately coarse to medium grained GRANITE with closely to moderately closely spaced, moderately narrow to narrow, rough, mainly fresh granite and manganese stained joints, dipping 25 degrees to 35 degrees and occasional subvertical.

Strong to moderately strong, brownish grey, spotted black and white, moderately coarse to medium grained GRANITE with closely spaced, moderately narrow to narrow, rough, mainly fresh granite and manganese stained joints, dipping 5 degrees to 10 degrees.

Strong to moderately strong, pinkish grey, spotted black and white, medium to moderately coarse grained, medium grained GRANITE with closely to moderately closely spaced, moderately narrow to narrow, rough, mainly fresh granite and manganese stained joints, dipping 5 degrees to 10 degrees.
